title: CobbleTCG-ResorcePack4
description: ResorucePacks for CobbleTCG with 22 collections and 4500+cards
body:
Resource Pack containing all 22 CobbleTCG collections for version 1.3.9 and above.

![All Collections](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ajEJaCCf/images/96e9841dda1bda30c84d5378de4e9786a88960ff.png)

# Texture Pack for CobbleTCG-1.3.9 includes:

- 2019 Sun & Moon-Unbroken Bounds  -  #238Cards
- 2019 Sun & Moon-Unified Minds  -  #260Cards
- 2022 Sword & Shield-Lost Origin  -  #247Cards
- 2024 Scarlet & Violet-Paldean Fates  -  #246Cards

More collections will be added in the future. I haven't decided yet how to expand them—whether I'll add new collections to the existing packs or create a separate pack for each new one.
